Variables.Name: A
Variables.Description: 1 to 4 dimensional vector, should be the same type as B

Variables.Name: B
Variables.Description: 1 to 4 dimensional vector, should be the same type as A

Variables.Name: Radius
Variables.Description: in the units that A and B are measured, if not hooked up the internal constant is used

Variables.Name: Hardness
Variables.Description: 0..1 for the range of 0\% to 100\%, if not hooked up the internal constant is used

Variables.Name: AttenuationRadius
Variables.Description: in the unit that A and B are measured
